DEPT.2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; SANDRA NAYLOR, CSR; V.T.INVENTADO, CLERK. 9:55 AM C/C FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF & PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PRESENT; DEFENDANT & DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL PRESENTED A MOTION TO WITHDRAW IN OPEN COURT AS COUNSEL OF RECORD. INFORMAL DISCUSSION IN CHAMBERS WITH BOTH COUNSELS. IN CAMERA HEARING IN COURT. 11:00 AM COURT IN RECESS. 2:00 PM COURT RECONVENE. MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTY OF RECORD IS DENIED; MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL FOR 2 WEEKS IS DENIED, NO GOOD CAUSE. COUNSELS & PARTIES TO APPEAR IN DEPT. 2 @ 9 AM, 1/16/97 FOR TRANSFER TO TRIAL DEPT. WHEN AVAILABLE.

DEPT. 2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; S. NAYLOR, CSR; V.T.INVENTADO, CLERK. THE COURT CONSIDERING THE PAPERS & ARGUMENTS IN CAMERA ON THE RECORD: (1) MOTION FOR COUNSEL TO WITHDRAW IS DENIED. MATTER CURRENTLY SET FOR TRIAL WITH PRIOR CONTINUANCE & COUNSEL CLIENT CONDITION APPEARS TO HAVE EXISTED WHEN THE SUBSTITUTED IN TO REPRESENT HER. THE RECORD IS ORDERED SEALED; (2) MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL FOR TWO WEEKS IS DENIED, THE COURT DOESN'T FIND GOOD CAUSE; (3) COUNSEL & PARTIES TO APPEAR DEPT.2 @ 9 AM, 1/16/97 FOR TRANSFER TO TRIAL DEPARTMENT WHEN AVAILABLE.
